purpose: A brand-new light theme folder declaring treatments.dynamic.banner with a tuned StyleToken and a frozen static banner fallback captured from one real @rotheric/visuals generator run, exercising the DynamicElement/DYNAMIC_GENERATORS seam end to end as its first real-world consumer (Phase B, S8).

public_api.name: manifest
public_api.description: The aquarelle ThemeManifest — pure data, no functions, no runtime schema.ts import. Consumed only via app/src/themes/registry.generated.ts's folder-name-driven static import (generated by app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs), exactly like every other theme folder's manifest export.

owned_data: this theme's own palette (colors.brand/success/warning/danger/neutral scales and semantic tokens)
this theme's pinned StyleToken (treatments.dynamic.banner.style: anchorHue 250, scheme 'analogous', saturation 55, lightness 45)
this theme's frozen static banner fallback (treatments.banner)
this theme's status field ('experimental' until S9 clears AC-PERF-3)
dependencies_allowed: app/src/themes/schema.ts (type-only import of ThemeManifest, per every other manifest's Boundary Rule)
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts (no manifest imports DYNAMIC_GENERATORS at runtime — it is referenced by name only, per Seam Contracts)
app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs (auto-detects this folder structurally; the folder does not import it)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts (THEME_IDS array extended to include 'aquarelle' so the existing AC-VAL-1/AC-VAL-2/AC-VAL-4 it.each blocks exercise it against the real contrast gate, schema, and order-uniqueness checks; AC-VAL-3's folder-set-drift check and the AC-STRUCT-4 scanner already generalize over the real folder/registry set with zero edits)

app/tests/unit/hooks/useDynamicBanner.test.ts (AC-A11Y-1's scrim-contrast block already iterates Object.values(APP_THEMES).map(t => t.colors.brand[5]) from the real registry — aquarelle's brand.500 is exercised with zero edits)
